A conflict of interest exists when personal interests or activities are not in line with Philips’ interests and influence, or appear to influence, our ability to perform our work objectively and in the best interests of the company. Examples of possible Conflicts of Interest:

- You award a contract to a third party in which you or a family member or friend have a financial interest.

- Next to your job at Philips, you also work part-time for another company.

- You decide to hire or manage a close family member or friend.

- You have a romantic or family relationship with someone in your management chain, direct or indirect report, customer or competitor.

fields.label: Are you currently legally authorized to work in the United States?
Will you now, or in the future, require sponsorship from Philips for an employment-authorized visa status (i.e., H-1B, L-1, TN, etc.) to work in the United States?
Do you have temporary authorization (e.g., OPT, CPT, or similar temporary work authorization) to currently work in the United States?

If you are currently in a period of Optional Practical Training (OPT), are you eligible for a 24-month OPT extension based upon a degree from a qualifying United States institution in Science, Technology, Engineering or Mathematics (STEM)?

A conflict of interest exists when personal interests or activities are not in line with Philips’ interests and influence, or appear to influence, our ability to perform our work objectively and in the best interests of the company. Examples of possible Conflicts of Interest: - You award a contract to a third party in which you or a family member or friend have a financial interest. - Next to your job at Philips, you also work part-time for another company. - You decide to hire or manage a close family member or friend. - You have a romantic or family relationship with someone in your management chain, direct or indirect report, customer or competitor. - You have a (material) financial interest in a customer or supplier of Philips. - You provide or receive financial support, such as a personal loan, to or from someone you also have a working relationship with, for example someone working at a distributor or customer of Philips. - In your own time, you offer services to a customer which are similar to those offered by Philips. Do you have any conflict of interest related to the examples mentioned above?
